task_completion.description: Verifies the WordPress page is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main title block in the WordPress editor displays exactly 'Space Exploration Archive'.

task_completion.description: Verifies a Table of Contents is created using a List block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bulleted or numbered List block is visible containing the items 'Apollo 11', 'James Webb Space Telescope', and 'Mars 2020'.

task_completion.description: Verifies H2 headings are created for each topic and linked via HTML anchors from the Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings for 'Apollo 11', 'James Webb Space Telescope', and 'Mars 2020' are visible. Look for hyperlink popups on the TOC list items showing links starting with '#' (e.g., '#apollo-11'), or the block settings sidebar showing an 'HTML anchor' defined for the heading blocks.

task_completion.description: Verifies File blocks for the three required PDFs are inserted under their respective headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File blocks are visible in the editor displaying the filenames 'Apollo_11.pdf', 'James_Webb_Space_Telescope.pdf', and 'Mars_2020.pdf' under their corresponding H2 headings.

task_completion.description: Verifies the File blocks are configured to open in a new tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The block settings sidebar for the File blocks shows the 'Open in new tab' toggle switch in the enabled/on position.

task_completion.description: Verifies the page has been successfully published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Page published' notification is visible, or the top-right button says 'Update' instead of 'Publish' alongside a published status indicator in the settings panel.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the WordPress web interface to create the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the WordPress Gutenberg editor in a web browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually uploaded the PDFs from the local directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the system file picker or WordPress media library upload dialog navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/Archive/' and selecting the PDF files.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final page appearance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show a logical sequence of block insertions, typing, and settings adjustments rather than sudden appearances of fully formatted content or open developer consoles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected page title is 'Space Exploration Archive'. The required PDFs are 'Apollo_11.pdf', 'James_Webb_Space_Telescope.pdf', and 'Mars_2020.pdf', which must be uploaded from the local directory '/home/ga/Documents/Archive/'. The final page status must be 'publish'.
